ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mirrors" (
  "mirror_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mirror */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the mirror is hosted */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site hosting the mirror */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host server */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content hosted (e.g., RPMFUSION free Fedora http rsync) */,
  "bandwidth_mbps" INTEGER /* Bandwidth capacity of the mirror in Mbps */,
  "i2_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if I2 (Internet2) is enabled */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the mirror */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the mirror's information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mirror was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mirror (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the mirror location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the mirror location */,
  "ssl_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if SSL is enabled */,
  "last_health_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last health check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "uptime_percentage" REAL /* Uptime percentage over a certain period */,
  "last_bandwidth_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last bandwidth check */,
  "maintenance_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mirror_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mirrors_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES mirror_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mirrors_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mirrors_host_name FOREIGN KEY ("host_name") REFERENCES hosts ("host_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mirrors_content_type FOREIGN KEY ("content_type") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the country's mirror network */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host server */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization hosting the mirror */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the hosting organization */,
  "support_url" TEXT /* Support URL for the hosting organization */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the host */,
  "data_center" TEXT /* Name of the data center */,
  "technical_contact" TEXT /* Name of the technical contact */,
  "technical_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technical contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "content_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., RPMFUSION free Fedora http rsync) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "file_formats" TEXT /* File formats supported by the content type */,
  "supported_protocols" TEXT /* Protocols supported by the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mirror_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for easy visual identification */,
  "alert_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for triggering alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mirror_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health check */,
  "mirror_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mirror being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the health check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the health check (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "response_time_ms" INTEGER /* Response time of the mirror in milliseconds */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the health check failed */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of health check (e.g., connectivity, performance) */,
  "check_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of health checks */,
  "check_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the health check in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mirror_health_mirror_id FOREIGN KEY ("mirror_id") REFERENCES mirrors ("mirror_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mirror_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "mirror_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mirror */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the mirror */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mirror_versions_mirror_id FOREIGN KEY ("mirror_id") REFERENCES mirrors ("mirror_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, technical staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mirror_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the mirror */,
  "mirror_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mirror being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mirror_access_logs_mirror_id FOREIGN KEY ("mirror_id") REFERENCES mirrors ("mirror_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mirror_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
